global.description: The ad features a vibrant blue background with a clear call to action and supporting text.
global.main_message: Encouraging users to book travel easily.

elements.label: Blue background
elements.description: A solid blue background fills the canvas, providing a vibrant base for the other elements.

elements.label: Main headline text
elements.description: Bold white text stating 'Book your next trip' is prominently displayed at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Supporting text
elements.description: Smaller white text below the headline reads 'Hotels & flights in one tap', providing additional context.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A rectangular button with the text 'Shop now' in white, inviting users to take action.

elements.label: Decorative shape
elements.description: An abstract shape in the center, possibly a placeholder for an image or graphic.

elements.label: Decorative shape
elements.description: Another abstract shape, smaller and positioned near the center, adding visual interest.

elements.label: Decorative shape
elements.description: A larger abstract shape, centered, which may represent a product or service.

elements.label: Decorative shape
elements.description: A smaller abstract shape, adding to the overall design without specific identification.

elements.label: Decorative shape
elements.description: Another abstract shape, contributing to the layered look of the ad.

elements.label: Small decorative element
elements.description: A small shape positioned towards the bottom, possibly for aesthetic balance.

elements.label: Small decorative element
elements.description: Another small shape, mirroring the previous one, enhancing the design.

elements.label: Main message text
elements.description: The main text area at the bottom contains the call to action and supporting details.
elements.text_content: Book your next trip Hotele tap Shop now

elements.label: Advertiser logo
elements.description: The logo 'NomadLayer' appears at the top left, indicating the brand behind the ad.

elements.label: User-generated content tag
elements.description: A small tag labeled 'UGC' indicating user-generated content, positioned near the logo.
